nasb.text: “For the day of the Lord draws near on all the nations. As you have done, it will be done to you. Your dealings will return on your own head.

esv.text: For the day of the Lord is near upon all the nations. As you have done, it shall be done to you; your deeds shall return on your own head.

cnv.text: 耶和華的日子臨近萬國了， 人必照你所行的向你施行， 你的報應必歸到你的頭上。

ccb.text: “耶和华惩罚万国的日子近了。 必按你的所作所为报应你， 你的恶行必落到自己头上。
